$comment: c35 D-CSUBSET-FORWARD-STRUCT-DECLARATION: an OPAQUE handle (`struct Stmt;` forward-declared, NEVER defined — the sqlite3_stmt pattern) passed BY POINTER through a NON-inlined call (step -> step_impl); the real object is a DIFFERENT defined `struct Vdbe` reached via void* (Vdbe-behind-sqlite3_stmt*). A `Ptr<incomplete>` is a sizeable, passable pointer, while the incomplete `struct Stmt` is never sized anywhere. 30+12=42. Without the forward-mint the opaque `struct Stmt *` would not type-check (S_UnknownType); a wrong `struct Vdbe` offset derails 42. Release pipeline + all 4 targets.
